spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail if state or data changes

spec_rule_context.category: CATEGORY 9: OPAL LIFECYCLE / ACTIVATE / REVERT RULES (opal/5.1.*)
spec_rule_context.condition: Revert invoked on Admin SP's SP object
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Revert on Admin SP; verify all SPs revert
spec_rule_context.expected_status: Entire TPer reverts to OFS (except C_PIN_SID under certain conditions); session aborted
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail if partial revert
spec_rule_context.title: Revert on Admin SP reverts entire TPer

spec_rule_context.condition: TPer SHALL report MaxAuthentications >= 2
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Properties method; verify MaxAuthentications >= 2
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — must support at least 2 concurrent authentications
spec_rule_context.title: MaxAuthentications minimum 2

spec_rule_context.condition: Global Range is both ReadLocked and WriteLocked when RevertSP is invoked with KeepGlobalRangeKey=True
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Lock GlobalRange, then RevertSP with KeepGlobalRangeKey=True; should fail
spec_rule_context.expected_status: FAIL status; SP SHALL NOT change lifecycle states
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — locked data cannot be preserved
spec_rule_context.title: RevertSP with KeepGlobalRangeKey=True fails if Global Range is Read+Write Locked

spec_rule_context.condition: TPer SHALL report MaxSessions >= 1
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Properties method; verify MaxSessions >= 1
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — must support at least 1 session
spec_rule_context.title: MaxSessions minimum 1

spec_rule_context.condition: AlignmentRequired=True AND RangeStart non-zero AND (RangeStart - LowestAlignedLBA) mod AlignmentGranularity != 0
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Set RangeStart to value not aligned to AlignmentGranularity
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — misaligned range start should be rejected
spec_rule_context.title: RangeStart alignment check — INVALID_PARAMETER if misaligned

spec_rule_context.category: CATEGORY 9: OPAL LIFECYCLE / ACTIVATE / REVERT RULES (opal/5.1.*)
spec_rule_context.condition: If Revert on Admin SP's own object, TPer SHALL abort session immediately after reporting status

spec_rule_context.condition: Global Range is both ReadLocked and WriteLocked when RevertSP is invoked with KeepGlobalRangeKey=True

spec_rule_context.expected_status: FAIL status; SP SHALL NOT change lifecycle states
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — locked data cannot be preserved
spec_rule_context.title: RevertSP with KeepGlobalRangeKey=True fails if Global Range is Read+Write Locked

spec_rule_context.condition: After RevertSP completes, TPer SHALL abort the session
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: RevertSP on LockingSP; session ends after status
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — session should not continue
spec_rule_context.title: RevertSP aborts session after reverting

spec_rule_context.condition: AlignmentRequired=True AND RangeStart non-zero AND (RangeStart - LowestAlignedLBA) mod AlignmentGranularity != 0
